Motion And Request For Dismissal Without Prejudice Pursuant To C.R.C. 3.770;
Off Calendar Nov-03-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF SAMUEL GONZALES' Motion And Request For Dismissal Without Prejudice Pursuant To C.R.C. 3.770;

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion and request for dismissal without prejudice pursuant to CRC 3.770" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
